enum_values.name: MainFlash
enum_values.description: Main Flash memory mapped at 0x0000_0000

enum_values.name: SystemFlash
enum_values.description: System Flash memory mapped at 0x0000_0000

enum_values.name: MainFlash2
enum_values.description: Main Flash memory mapped at 0x0000_0000

enum_values.name: SRAM
enum_values.description: Embedded SRAM mapped at 0x0000_0000

enum_values.name: NotRemapped
enum_values.description: ADC DMA request mapped on DMA channel 1

enum_values.name: Remapped
enum_values.description: ADC DMA request mapped on DMA channel 2

enum_values.name: NotRemapped
enum_values.description: USART1_TX DMA request mapped on DMA channel 2

enum_values.name: Remapped
enum_values.description: USART1_TX DMA request mapped on DMA channel 4

enum_values.name: NotRemapped
enum_values.description: USART1_RX DMA request mapped on DMA channel 3

enum_values.name: Remapped
enum_values.description: USART1_RX DMA request mapped on DMA channel 5

enum_values.name: NotRemapped
enum_values.description: TIM16_CH1 and TIM16_UP DMA request mapped on DMA channel 3

enum_values.name: Remapped
enum_values.description: TIM16_CH1 and TIM16_UP DMA request mapped on DMA channel 4

enum_values.name: NotRemapped
enum_values.description: TIM17_CH1 and TIM17_UP DMA request mapped on DMA channel 1

enum_values.name: Remapped
enum_values.description: TIM17_CH1 and TIM17_UP DMA request mapped on DMA channel 2

fields.name: I2C_PB6_FMP
fields.description: Fast Mode Plus (FM plus) driving capability activation bits.

enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.description: PB6 pin operate in standard mode

enum_values.name: FMP
enum_values.description: I2C FM+ mode enabled on PB6 and the Speed control is bypassed

fields.name: I2C_PB7_FMP
fields.description: Fast Mode Plus (FM+) driving capability activation bits.

enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.description: PB7 pin operate in standard mode

enum_values.name: FMP
enum_values.description: I2C FM+ mode enabled on PB7 and the Speed control is bypassed

fields.name: I2C_PB8_FMP
fields.description: Fast Mode Plus (FM+) driving capability activation bits.

enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.description: PB8 pin operate in standard mode

enum_values.name: FMP
enum_values.description: I2C FM+ mode enabled on PB8 and the Speed control is bypassed

fields.name: I2C_PB9_FMP
fields.description: Fast Mode Plus (FM+) driving capability activation bits.

enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.description: PB9 pin operate in standard mode

enum_values.name: FMP
enum_values.description: I2C FM+ mode enabled on PB9 and the Speed control is bypassed

fields.name: I2C1_FMP
fields.description: FM+ driving capability activation for I2C1

enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.description: FM+ mode is controlled by I2C_Pxx_FMP bits only

enum_values.name: FMP
enum_values.description: FM+ mode is enabled on all I2C1 pins selected through selection bits in GPIOx_AFR registers

enum_values.name: NotRemapped
enum_values.description: USART3_RX and USART3_TX DMA requests mapped on DMA channel 6 and 7 respectively (or simply disabled on STM32F0x0)

enum_values.name: Remapped
enum_values.description: USART3_RX and USART3_TX DMA requests mapped on DMA channel 3 and 2 respectively

fields.name: PA11_PA12_RMP
fields.description: PA11 and PA12 remapping bit for small packages (28 and 20 pins)

enum_values.name: NotRemapped
enum_values.description: Pin pair PA9/PA10 mapped on the pins

enum_values.name: Remapped
enum_values.description: Pin pair PA11/PA12 mapped instead of PA9/PA10

fields.name: I2C_PA9_FMP
fields.description: Fast Mode Plus (FM+) driving capability activation bits

enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.description: PA9 pin operate in standard mode

enum_values.name: FMP
enum_values.description: I2C FM+ mode enabled on PA9 and the Speed control is bypassed

fields.name: I2C_PA10_FMP
fields.description: Fast Mode Plus (FM+) driving capability activation bits

enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.description: PA10 pin operate in standard mode

enum_values.name: FMP
enum_values.description: I2C FM+ mode enabled on PA10 and the Speed control is bypassed

enum_values.name: PA
enum_values.description: Select PAx as the source input for the EXTIx external interrupt

enum_values.name: PB
enum_values.description: Select PBx as the source input for the EXTIx external interrupt

enum_values.name: PC
enum_values.description: Select PCx as the source input for the EXTIx external interrupt

enum_values.name: PD
enum_values.description: Select PDx as the source input for the EXTIx external interrupt

enum_values.name: PF
enum_values.description: Select PFx as the source input for the EXTIx external interrupt

enum_values.name: NoParityError
enum_values.description: No SRAM parity error detected

enum_values.name: ParityErrorDetected
enum_values.description: SRAM parity error detected

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clear SRAM parity error flag

enum_values.name: Disconnected
enum_values.description: SRAM parity error disconnected from TIM1/15/16/17 Break input

enum_values.name: Connected
enum_values.description: SRAM parity error connected to TIM1/15/16/17 Break input

enum_values.name: Disconnected
enum_values.description: Cortex-M0 LOCKUP output disconnected from TIM1/15/16/17 Break input

enum_values.name: Connected
enum_values.description: Cortex-M0 LOCKUP output connected to TIM1/15/16/17 Break input
